template_description: Modern English resume template with clean, contemporary design while maintaining ATS compatibility

contact.notes: Clean header with name prominent. Contact info in single line below name.

summary.title: Professional Summary
summary.guidelines: 2-3 impactful sentences. Lead with strongest qualification. Include quantifiable impact where possible.
summary.example: Results-driven Software Engineer with 8+ years building high-scale distributed systems. Reduced infrastructure costs by 40% while improving system reliability from 99.5% to 99.99%. Expert in Go, Kubernetes, and cloud-native architectures.

work_experience.title: Experience

entries.guidelines: 3-5 bullet points. Lead with impact metric. Use present tense for current role.
entries.example_bullet: Reduced deployment frequency from weekly to multiple times daily by implementing CI/CD pipelines, cutting release cycle time by 90%

work_experience.notes: Company name and title on same line for compact layout. Focus on recent 3-4 roles.

entries.notes: GPA only if >3.5. For experienced candidates, keep this section brief.

skills.title: Skills
skills.notes: Use compact inline format. Group by relevance to target role. Limit to 12-15 skills.

projects.title: Selected Projects

entries.guidelines: Only include 1-2 most impressive projects. Keep descriptions to one line.
entries.example: Open-source Kubernetes operator for automated database failover — 2.3K GitHub stars

projects.notes: Optional. Only include projects with measurable impact or significant recognition.

certifications.title: Certifications
certifications.notes: Optional. Only list current, relevant certifications.

font.name: Calibri
font.notes: Modern sans-serif for clean look. Calibri is widely available and ATS-friendly.

layout.notes: Single column with generous whitespace. Subtle horizontal rules between sections.

color_scheme.notes: Muted dark tones with subtle blue accent for headings. No more than 2 colors.

dont: Use color as the only differentiator
Include personal information (age, photo, marital status)

example_resume.summary: Results-driven Senior Software Engineer with 8+ years building high-scale distributed systems. Reduced infrastructure costs by 40% ($200K annually) while improving system reliability from 99.5% to 99.99%. Expert in Go, Kubernetes, and cloud-native architectures. Passionate about developer experience and platform engineering.

work_experience.title: Staff Platform Engineer
bullet_points: Architected internal developer platform serving 200+ engineers, reducing onboarding time from 2 weeks to 2 days
Migrated 50+ microservices from EC2 to Kubernetes, cutting infrastructure costs by 35% ($150K/year)
Designed and implemented multi-region disaster recovery strategy achieving 99.99% uptime SLA
Built self-service deployment pipeline handling 500+ production deployments per week

work_experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
bullet_points: Led team of 6 engineers to rebuild data pipeline, increasing throughput from 10TB/day to 50TB/day
Implemented real-time monitoring and alerting system, reducing mean time to detection from 30 min to 2 min
Mentored 4 junior engineers through promotion to mid-level within 18 months

projects.name: KubeSaver
projects.description: Open-source Kubernetes cost optimization operator with intelligent pod right-sizing
